ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Peace, love, and Steel Wool. Shred in style with the Lars Pack</>

Featuring:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Peace, love, and Steel Wool. Shred in style with the Lars Pack</>

Featuring:

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!

Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString:
V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!

Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

Name.SourceString: Access to <text color="CA92FFFF">“Save the World” PvE Campaign</>
Name.LocalizedString: Access to <text color="CA92FFFF">“Save the World” PvE Campaign</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="CA92FFFF">Lars Challenges:</> Earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks and 1,000 X-Ray Tickets by completing <text color="CA92FFFF">Save the World</> daily quests. Rewards distributed after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 1" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="CA92FFFF">Lars Challenges:</> Earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks and 1,000 X-Ray Tickets by completing <text color="CA92FFFF">Save the World</> daily quests. Rewards distributed after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 1" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.
